cause_analysis.narrative: Men’s Bodywork by Trevor James churned on 2026-04-17 after 128 days with Zoca.
recommendations: [Audit] No single smoking gun. Worth a manual review to find non-obvious signals outside this data pipeline (Slack, account notes, AM memory).

messages.body: Hey Ayite 👋 It's Harvey from ZocaAI.  We noticed you ghosted us back in August. No hard feelings, we clearly needed to do better.  Spoiler: we did. A lot better.  New features, better pricing, and way fewer reasons to leave. We'd love to show you what's changed — on us. Free demo, no strings, I promise it's worth 20 mi…
